title: Microsoft is cutting support for some older OneDrive systems soon - here's what you need to know
summary: 22H2 was the final version of Windows 10 – the next upgrade after that represents a brand new OS that brings with it some hardware limitations. "This change aligns OneDrive support with the Windows lifecycle policy and helps Microsoft focus ongoing investments…
